home.title: Uni Sport EC | Strategic Consulting & Sports Management
home.description: Experts in sports consulting, talent management and high-performance event organization across Ecuador and Spain.

services.title: Services | Uni Sport EC — Consulting, Events and Sports Talent
services.description: Three service lines: strategic consulting, end-to-end event management and talent development. Tailored solutions for clubs, federations and institutions.

partners.title: Partners | Uni Sport EC — Sports Consulting Leadership Team
partners.description: Uni Sport EC leadership team: Bernardo Naranjo, Fausto Rodríguez and Alex Espinosa. Complementary careers connecting strategy, sport and the global market.

insights.title: Insights | Uni Sport EC — Sports Business strategic analysis
insights.description: Strategic analysis on sports management, marketing and digital transformation. Case studies on Celta360, Apollo Sports Capital, ownership and digital sports business.

contact.title: Contact | Uni Sport EC — Request your situation analysis
contact.description: Let's talk about your sports project. Hubs in Madrid and Quito. Request a situation analysis: we reply in under 48 hours.

hero.title: Strategy, Events and Consulting for Global Sport
hero.subtitle: We design, manage and execute sports projects for companies, federations and institutions. We turn ambition into measurable results.

services.title: Services
services.card1Body: We design, analyze and plan sports projects. We deliver feasibility studies, positioning and business models for clubs, brands and organizations.
services.card2Body: End-to-end production of tournaments, leagues and international events: operations, logistics, partners and fan + participant experience.
services.card3Body: People and Market: we connect sports potential with industry opportunities.

about.title: Mission, Vision & Values
about.missionBody: Transform the sports industry through high-precision strategic consulting, integrating cutting-edge technology and elite methodologies to maximize profitability, operational efficiency and institutional value for our clients.
about.visionBody: To be the leading sports consulting firm in Latin America, recognized for connecting local talent potential with global management and capital standards, leading the transition toward a sustainable digital sports business model.

track.title: Proven track record on projects for:

hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: An integrated offer in consulting, events and talent for companies, federations and institutions in the sports ecosystem.

tabs.consultingLead: Strategy, marketing, AI and investment readiness.
tabs.eventsLead: Camps, leagues, tournaments and sports experiences.

hero.title: Partners
hero.subtitle: Three complementary careers joining strategy, sport and market to scale projects with a global vision.

cta.heading: Have a project in mind? Our team is ready to listen.
